global_rules: Strictly no border radius: rounded-none everywhere (--radius: 0rem)
Strictly Inter font for all text
All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. p-6, p-8. Containers must have padding to prevent text collision with borders.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use strict bento grids with gap-1px to create a technical/brutalist border-collapse look, or gap-4 with full sharp borders.
spacing_and_layout.mobile: Mobile-first PWA, bottom navigation fixed at the bottom with border-t border-[#3A3A3C].

components.button: rounded-none shadow-none border border-transparent. Primary: bg-white text-[#1C1C1E] hover:bg-[#D4D4D6]. Secondary/Ghost: bg-transparent border-white text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-[#1C1C1E]
components.card: rounded-none shadow-none border border-[#3A3A3C] bg-[#1C1C1E] p-6
components.input: rounded-none shadow-none border border-[#3A3A3C] bg-transparent focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-white focus-visible:outline-none
components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full border-t border-[#3A3A3C] bg-[#1C1C1E] flex justify-around p-4 pb-safe
components.slider: For daily check-ins: Use Shadcn slider but customize to have rectangular thumb (rounded-none) and sharp track. bg-[#3A3A3C] for track, bg-white for active and thumb.

media.description: Abstract minimalist dark texture for subtle brutalist background without gradients.
High contrast black and white portrait of a determined man looking forward.
Grayscale close-up portrait of a male athlete in a track and field setting, usable for content sections.
Dark textured surface with raised cylindrical shapes for a brutalist feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Force dark mode by default on the HTML tag or Tailwind config.
Do NOT use Recharts with rounded bars. Use sharp rectangles.
Do NOT use any gradients in charts. Use solid lines and fills.
Do NOT use any emojis. Use Lucide icons (sharp, unrounded if possible, or default Lucide).
Ensure all buttons, inputs, cards, and containers have rounded-none and shadow-none applied explicitly.
Include <meta name='theme-color' content='#1C1C1E'> in index.html for PWA.
For the bottom nav, ensure it accommodates safe area insets on mobile (e.g. padding-bottom).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, inputs, and major sections.
